reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1: isValidSignature exists in src/GPV2CompatibleAuction.sol and qualifies under the public API exception (EIP-1271 interface called externally by CowSwap settlement; also referenced in vendor GPv2Signing.sol). Gate 2: attack entry point is cowswap_solvers (trust_level=UNTRUSTED per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json). Gate 3: src/GPV2CompatibleAuction.sol is explicitly in scope and isValidSignature() is a listed entry point. An attacker (CowSwap solver) can trigger this via GPV2CompatibleAuction.isValidSignature() by constructing a partial order with order.sellAmount=1 wei and a proportional buyAmount, causing CowSwap settlement to execute and transfer tokens while bypassing the s_minBidUsdValue minimum-bid USD threshold enforced in the BaseAuction.bid() path. Severity remains Medium: conditional invariant violation (threshold bypass on CowSwap path only) consistent with BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE Medium examples.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-003 — assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): bidUsdValue(amount, price) >= s_minBidUsdValue
